title: Experience Container
description: Adds experience storage barrels in which you can preserve your XP
body:
# 🧩 Experience Container

![XpContainers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a6e970d1ba9b46fa535727b438bb52c3654f6ab_0.webp)

Experience Container is a lightweight utility mod for Fabric that introduces a simple, vanilla-like way to manage your experience.


### 💡 Why use this mod?
Its perfect for players who want to save their experience.

[![Fabric Api](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0268889a033bcf91b471edd30423de48982daeb_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

![Loader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/497a72575789b326d74bda2b839cd24cc4d20a5d.png)
![Environment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6ef656c95d89f93a16d7b4660f42ff987bb8414.png)
ㅤㅤ
----------------------------------------------------
ㅤㅤ
![Container](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b14e528222924638c73a0b0e1eb0617a2ca809f_0.webp)
ㅤㅤ

### Features:
  
- If you break an experience container with silk touch, it will drop a barrel with XP
  
- Right-clicking will show the current experience and level or the added amount

- The barrel has a tooltip showing the amount of experience

- When a experience container breaks, it drops experience

ㅤ
ㅤ

### How to Use:

1. Craft an Experience Container
   
2. Place barrel and add experience (RMB) to store XP
   
3. Break barrel to release XP

ㅤ

**Questions about the mod?**
